name: FF_DATABASE_ITEMS_VL
query: SELECT B.DATABASE_ITEM_ID DATABASE_ITEM_ID, B.BASE_USER_NAME BASE_USER_NAME, B.BASE_USER_NAME USER_NAME, TL.DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION, B.USER_ENTITY_ID USER_ENTITY_ID, B.DATA_TYPE DATA_TYPE, B.NULL_ALLOWED_FLAG NULL_ALLOWED_FLAG, B.DEFINITION_TEXT DEFINITION_TEXT, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, B.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, B.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, B.MODULE_ID MODULE_ID, B.ENTERPRISE_ID ENTERPRISE_ID, B.SGUID SGUID FROM FF_DATABASE_ITEMS_B B, FF_DATABASE_ITEMS_TL TL WHERE B.DATABASE_ITEM_ID = TL.DATABASE_ITEM_ID AND TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
